entries.message: Manifest remains at accepted plugin version 0.1.1; no premature v1.1 claim.
All accepted v1 dependency pins remain present.
Accepted v1 direct dependencies have compatible offline runtime wheels.
Unapproved Kingbase driver/dialect is not declared as a release dependency.
Canonical v1 artifact exists with accepted SHA-256 CEE3B0D7D54ECF1171E78739FF01C12D204F9B0CCCF7627D51AFAA69631A142B.
Only the named 0.1.1 Linux amd64 package is canonical; 7 other package artifact(s) remain historical/test/development and must not be selected for release.
Approved ksycopg2 CPython 3.12 Linux x86_64 wheel is not present in wheels/.
SQLAlchemy 2.0.51-compatible Kingbase dialect artifact is not present.
Required libkci/native client contents and ldd closure are not available.
Vendor driver, dialect, native-library, image, and license redistribution review is incomplete.
A v1.1 package must not be built until real KingbaseES runtime acceptance passes.
